---
title: "Infographic"
author: "Helena Parsons"
date: "2026-05-27"
format: pdf
---

# 1: Loading packages
```{r}
#| label: loading-packages
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(rstatix)
library(ggeffects)
```

# 2: Visualizations

## 2a. Reading in data
```{r}
#| label: object-for-data


job_search <- read_csv("here", "personal-data.csv")
```
